description: A few years ago, we implemented a real-time threat detection system in our company to protect our network. For this project we used a large number of engineers and technicians and we decided to manage and execute the project using the Zoho Sprints tool because of its simplicity and agility. The project was dynamic and 3-week sprints were created focusing on well defined objectives with a detailed backlog of all the tasks required. Collaboration was an important part of the project due to the expansion of our network and tracking progress was essential.
author: Rodrigo T.
pros: I found the Scrum Dashboard to be very intuitive and useful, allowing me to track tasks in sprints. The comments, messages and virtual meetings helped us to solve problems quickly. The estimation of tasks in terms of effort helped us to be more efficient.
cons: Zoho Sprints lacks more advanced features for very large and complex projects, but it is still much better than other competitors.

review_title: Good budget-friendly software to manage multiple projects
description: Overall it is good. I am trying to integrate this with Zoho Desk - that way it would help us a lot.
author: Guruprasad B.
pros: Easy to setup and start using for multiple projects.
cons: The data capture interface (like creating a new ticket). It is not user friendly - particularly having to click "Update" whenever the description is updated. Adding a comment is also tricky.. this is buried in the long list of other features that i might not use..
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: I use Zoho Sprints to plan and track my team's work easily and efficiently.
author: Javier F.
pros: Love the customizable features and seamless integration with other Zoho apps.
cons: I wish the UI was more intuitive and user-friendly, and the mobile app needs improvement.

review_title: Enhanced collaboration next to project transparency
description: It facilitates a seamless integration from project overviews to the work and collaboration which makes it more up to date (vs. having non-connected tools).
author: Christoph B.
pros: Zoho sprint module provides the right combination of coordination and results driven tracking of progress. It helps to trigger agile sprints by connecting the stakeholders and move on with projects.
cons: It is a separate tool to work in the projects which are usually rather described and tracked in Zoho (general). So, it comes on top of the existing subscription.

author: Cuthbert W.
pros: Comprehensive, well-structured and conducive to collaboration.
cons: Need to learn how to use it, but there are instructional video can help.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

author: Mathew M.
pros: I'm impressed of the customer service team which responds to issues or inquiries i time leading to quick solutions. It's mobile application is easy to use
cons: I have no complaints about zoho Sprint because it works beyond my expectation and I only appreciate it's services.

description: My overall experience with Zoho Sprints has been fulfilling. It has been very effective in ensuring management of all IT needs. It has also been so important in project management.
author: Labidi T.
pros: It is very customizable. This tool allows us create a great dashboard that helps us attain a great and effective workflow. It promotes great collaboration within the department. It helps in sharing information pertaining IT issues. It also integrates well with other tools.
cons: Zoho Sprints has been an exceptional tool in managing all IT needs. I have no dislikes on this tool so far.

description: It favors having a more agile and specific communication of each project, giving order and without errors
author: Dylan C.
pros: When it comes to developing a new launch campaign, Zoho Sprints is the most appropriate tool, as it has the entire workflow more organized and a perfect planning from start to finish, achieving success in the proposed objectives. It is a work tool that has undoubtedly improved the management method of each new project
cons: There are no errors in its system and there is no mistreatment in its customer communication service

description: It has simplified projects, they are useful tools that help processing from start to finish and improve workloads
author: Steven M.
pros: Zoho Sprints has allowed me to have a better structured group work from the beginning of each project to the end, it makes the information process in a more fluid way and everyone collaborates in the same way, I like all its tools that have been useful and intelligently used well, great things can be achieved for the benefit of the work
cons: It is a well-structured platform where there are no usage errors or poor service on their part

review_title: Zoho Sprints is an Ideal Tool in IT Management
description: My experience with this tool has been positive with no problems encountered. It offers an intuitive interface for agile project management. It helps in backlog grooming, time tracking and sprint planning with ease. This make it the ideal tool for all IT management needs.
author: Khaoula B.
pros: It has agile project tracking and task management features. With this tool we have been able to manage and develop our software with ease without necessarily involving IT experts. Zoho Sprints also promotes collaboration within the company which has brought about high productivity for the company. It is also highly customizable to maintain a great workflow.
cons: Zoho Sprints has great features that has made our IT management easy and efficient. I have no complaints so far.

description: Zoho sprint can really streamline the entire project lifecycle, thus enhancing productivity. It gives real time visibility into project status, work items, team utilization, backlog etc.
author: Nilesh L.
pros: Simplicity and flexibility. This ensures high adoption rate.
cons: Nothing much actually. The product seems to have all the features that one would want.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Zoho Sprints Does a Great Job Managing Service Projects
description: We like the simplicity of the interface and the ease in how we can have staff get trained on the tool. If the tool gets in the way of the project, we get rid of it. So far, we're very happy in how easy it was for people to get involved in the tool.
author: Ed K.
pros: One of the biggest problems we have is that we have software developers, writers, and graphic designers coming together to support a single project. We've found that Sprints uses an easy format so the tool doesn't become an impediment to managing projects that include multiple disciplines.
cons: The free version doesn't work for us. We have finite resources and a growing pool of projects, so we use Epics to manage how resources are used across multiple projects and sprints. Not using Epics makes management much more difficult.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Kudos!! Every project is possible with Zoho sprints.
author: claire N.
pros: I love how you can schedule meeting to discuss project tasks and ideas and control the meetings and the users.
cons: Difficulties in integrating Zoho sprints to other external tools

author: Brent V.
pros: It has the ability for very extensive features and gave me and my project group a very clear overview during our project.
cons: Maybe more explanation on functions when using.
author_profession: EXTERN CONSULTANT OF UNI TO SOFTWARE COMPANY
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: Zoho Sprints is great for scrum businesses.
author: Tom F.
pros: Great for agile businesses. Works well for tracking tasks.
cons: Navigating the dashboards takes some getting used to.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: I have used Zoho sprints in my earlier organization 5 years back. Now I am configuring this for my new organization as I like the simplicity of the product very much.
author: Vaibhav P.
pros: simple UI and features that are easy to adapt.
cons: Somehow currently our requirement is about creating sprints from two or more projects which is not possible in zoho sprints.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: Helped a lot with project management and managing team. Increased the productivity.
author: Anjal M.
pros: Very effective for team management and collaboration. Tasks can be managed easily.
cons: It would be great if the interface could be more user friendly.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

author: Ahmad H.
pros: * Intuitive interface as Zoho often praised for its user-friendly design, making it easy for teams of all sizes to get started and navigate the platform. * Integration with other Zoho tools * Affordable pricing
cons: Limited Customization, no resource management or advanced reporting
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Zoho Sprints has been a game-changer for our project management needs!
author: Fernando P.
pros: So user-friendly, great for tracking sprints, and collaboration is a breeze. Love the integrations with other Zoho apps.
cons: I wish the reporting feature was more customizable and there were more third-party app integrations available.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Jira is not the only tool startups should consider for Sprint management ...
description: Zoho Sprints has proved to be a great tool for us technical and product people. When we first picked the tool, mainly because we were using other tools in the Zoho Suite, we were not sure if we were making the right choice. But after 18+ months of using it, I feel my bet has paid off. It has all the features I need in a good sprint management tool and then some more.
author: Jaideep T.
pros: Zoho Sprints is a very easy to use and intuitive sprint management tool. It was very easy to setup and customizeable in many ways. Reporting capabilities are good and the flexibility built into this online only app are great.
cons: There doesn't seem to be too much active development on this product. Integration with self-hosted Gitlab was promised more than a year back, and there doesn't seem to be any progress on it. Meetings don't sync with Google Calendar, so its pointless even using that feature in the tool. But other than that, everything else is very good.

description: So far so good, Have all essential features to Run a Agile - Scrum Framework !
author: Daniel C.
pros: ZOHO Sprints is ideal for mid-size companies, who wish to run Agile Project management, THey have all the essential features & Capabilities which is required to run the show. The main highlight is their Pricing ! It is affordable and great value for money for the features they provide. The best part is You can import everything from JIRA, within just 5 minutes. Special mention to the ZOHO Support team and Demo team, they did a amazing job in helping us move into ZOHO Sprints
cons: The Item Description area - Text editing can be richer with the ability to prepare tables and copy-paste screenshots
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: this software is amazing to keep close to a projeto no matter ou big or small it is.
author: Hélio P.
pros: In our company zoho is used as a tool to makes us more capacited to track all te events envolved to launch a new produtct
cons: analytics would be improved as well the software icons, images and visual itself to look more modern

description: An excellent and very efficient platform!
author: ako M.
pros: The platform is very easy to navigate and use as it is accessible to all team/platform members. You can customize it and integrate it with other Zoho applications which is very simple to do.
cons: Although the platform offers some limited customization options, it is very annoying to be able to determine the timesheet and project performance of each user of the platform.

description: The overall experience has been excellent till now.
author: Shubham K.
pros: The overall visibility of the software. Use of filters, which are very detailed in this software
cons: Not any. The overall experience has been good till now.

author: Verified Reviewer
pros: It's energy, the ease of use and the overall stylish looks
cons: I liked everything about this software! :)
